createStateModel.returns: { getState, setState, subscribe, createList, renameList, deleteList, createCard, editCard, deleteCard, moveCard, reorderCard } — full state-model API.

DEFAULT_SEED.value: { lists: [{id:<gen>, name:'To Do', cards:[]}, {id:<gen>, name:'Doing', cards:[]}, {id:<gen>, name:'Done', cards:[]}] }
DEFAULT_SEED.notes: Used by integration when persistence.load returns null. Per A11.

notes: integration constructs the state-model with persisted state if present, otherwise with DEFAULT_SEED.
